title: cyclosorus basilaris
intro: Cyclosorus basilaris, also known as the Basal Lady Fern, is a type of fern that belongs to the family Thelypteridaceae. It is native to tropical and subtropical regions of the world and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Cyclosorus basilaris include reducing fever, relieving headaches and body aches, and promoting wound healing. The plant can be prepared as a tea, powder, or tincture, and is often used in herbal remedies to support overall health and well-being.
